name: Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until well combined. Add vanilla extract and mix in.
2. Gradually add flour to the mixture, stirring until a dough forms. Chill the dough for one hour.
3. Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C). Pinch off a small piece of dough and roll it into a ball between your palms. Flatten slightly so the dough is not too thick.
4. Place a Hershey's Kiss in the center of each flattened dough portion. Bring the edges of the dough up around the kiss, shaping to cover completely.
5. Arrange the shaped cookies about one inch apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the edges are just starting to brown.
7. Allow the cookies to cool before rolling them in confectioner's sugar.
